hooks.command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 🤖 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker set 💬 || true
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" config state marker clear || true
bash -c 'set -o pipefail; jq -r .name | xargs -I{} bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" switch --create {} --no-cd --format=json | jq -r .path'
bash -c 'set -o pipefail; jq -r .worktree_path | xargs -I{} bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/wt.sh" remove --foreground {}'
